text: As I step inside this research and development space, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with a slight disorientation. The glow of neon lights and the reflective glass both invite exploration and blur my sense of boundaries. The text I read on the screen resonates with me—my perception feels blurred, not just by the display, but by the overwhelming stimuli of technology and innovation. It is a reminder of how easily clarity can slip away in a whirlwind of information. Standing here, I’m compelled to reflect on how focus is both precious and easily lost in the modern world.
